title: Staffing Dispatch Software: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Staffing Dispatch Software, helping staffing agencies manage dispatch operations.
content:
Staffing Dispatch Software Overview

Dispatch is important for staffing agencies to assign candidates to positions. Staffing agencies need dispatch software including dispatch scheduling, assignment management, coordination. Staffing dispatch software helps agencies achieve dispatch scheduling, assignment management, coordination.

Platform Reviews

Bullhorn Dispatch

Bullhorn provides CRM-integrated dispatch features. Dispatch scheduling features schedule dispatch. Assignment management features manage assignments. Coordination features coordinate dispatch activities.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting dispatch software should focus on dispatch scheduling, assignment management, coordination, and cost structure.
author: Dispatch Software Research Institute
